productDisplayName: Timberland Unisex Casual Gold Casual Shoes
description: Dress your infant in style with this timberland Hollyberry Crib shoe. Made of supple premium nubuck leather with a high ankle, this bootie is sure to keep your infant safe from the winter chill and comfortable to the hilt. UpperLightweight, flexible construction designed as a foot covering, and has enough coverage for early walkersNubuck upper with a fabric hi-ankle wrap and soft feather construction for absolute comfort and durabilityFabric wrap secured by a velcro closure to customise FitSoft feather construction inner lining for absolute sweat-free, all-day comfortHi-ankle to support the lower leg Padded fabric footbed for all-day comfortOutsolePadded suede footbed with branding printed on outsole for comfort and styleShoe careUse a suede and nubuck brush Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
